items.answer: Yes — all machinery is available on a wet hire basis with experienced operators included.

items.answer: Both — we offer flexible contract and hourly rate arrangements to suit your project.

items.answer: We primarily service the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions.

items.title: Roads & Dams Construction
items.description: Experienced in construction of private and rural roads and water storage dams. Built to last in Hunter Valley conditions.

page.heroSub: Durable roads and reliable water storage solutions for rural and commercial properties.
page.intro: Whether you need a farm access road built to handle heavy loads or a dam to secure your water supply, Mitchell Bros has the machinery and know-how to deliver lasting results.

steps.title: Site Visit & Quote
steps.description: We inspect the site and provide a detailed quote.

steps.description: We mobilise the appropriate machinery and complete the work efficiently.

steps.title: Completion
steps.description: Final inspection to ensure the road or dam meets your requirements.

items.question: Can you build roads suitable for heavy vehicles?
items.answer: Yes — we design and construct rural roads to handle agricultural and heavy vehicle traffic.

items.question: Do you handle dam repairs as well as new builds?
items.answer: Yes — we can reshape, repair and enlarge existing dams as well as construct new ones.

cta.headline: Need a Road or Dam Built?

items.question: What size excavators do you have?
items.answer: We operate a 4.5 tonne, 13 tonne, and 20 tonne excavator — giving us the right machine for any job size.

about.headline: About Mitchell Bros Earthmoving
about.body:
We're a family-owned and operated business that's been getting the groundwork done across the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions for over 30 years. From agricultural earthworks to commercial and industrial projects, our experienced operators and well-maintained fleet are available Monday to Friday, all year round.

When you deal with MBE, you're dealing with a professional team who know this region, understand the conditions, and take pride in delivering results. We offer both contract and hourly rates to suit the way you work.

highlights.text: Family owned and operated for over 30 years
Wet hire — operators included with all machinery

aboutPage.heroSub: 30+ years of family-owned earthmoving in the Cessnock, Maitland and Upper Hunter regions.

mission.headline: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide reliable, professional earthmoving services with the right machine for every job. We're built on local knowledge, experienced operators, and a commitment to getting the work done properly — every time.

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: Mitchell Bros Earthmoving has been part of the Hunter Valley landscape for over 30 years. What started as a family business has grown into one of the region's most trusted earthmoving operations — with an extensive fleet capable of handling everything from small residential excavations to large-scale agricultural and industrial projects.

We service a broad range of industries including agriculture, commercial construction, residential development, industrial, and mining. Our operators bring decades of on-the-ground experience in the local conditions that define this region.

We operate Monday to Friday all year round, and we keep things simple: the right machine, the right operator, and a fair rate. Whether you need a machine on a contract basis or by the hour, we'll find the arrangement that works for you.

items.title: Local Knowledge
items.description: We know the soils, terrain and conditions of the Hunter Valley better than anyone — because we've been working here for over 30 years.

items.title: Extensive Fleet
items.description: From a 4.5t mini excavator to a 20t excavator, dozer, grader and more — we have the right machine for any job.

items.title: Experienced Operators
items.description: All machinery is available on wet hire with skilled, professional operators who know how to get the job done safely and efficiently.

items.title: Flexible Arrangements
items.description: We offer both contract and hourly rates so you can engage us in whatever way suits your project best.
